public interface IEntityProcessingContext

The IEntityProcessingContext type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Entity
Returns the entity being processed.
ExtendedData
Extended data object.
Operation
Returns the current type of operation.

Type
UnitOfWork
If the entity is being committed, this property contains the unit of work.
